name: WhatsInMyPackage
description: Existing customer wants to know what products, services, channels, speeds, and features are included in their current Virgin Media package — they are checking what they have, not reporting a problem with it, requesting a change, or asking about their bill.

sampleUtterances.utterance: What's included in my current Virgin Media package?
Tell me what {packageProductType} I have in my bundle
